title: Anyone going to 10 the screenings at the SDCC

summary: []: Anyone going to 1.0 the screenings at the SDCC?             Quote Post by Psychotronic » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:57 pm Anyone going to the San Diego Comic-Con screening? I know I and some friends I'm going to drag will. http://www.comic-con.org/cci/cci09_anime_thu.php#thu Interestingly, ANN seems to be saying that 1.0 will be playing on days other then Thursday http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-06-12/eva-1.0-film-on-70+n-american

chunks.content:
Article: Anyone going to 10 the screenings at the SDCC
[]: Anyone going to 1.0 the screenings at the SDCC?             Quote Post by Psychotronic » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:57 pm Anyone going to the San Diego Comic-Con screening? I know I and some friends I'm going to drag will. http://www.comic-con.org/cci/cci09_anime_thu.php#thu Interestingly, ANN seems to be saying that 1.0 will be playing on days other then Thursday http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-06-12/eva-1.0-film-on-70+n-american-screens-this-summer I didn't see anything on the CCI site about anything other then Thursday so I'm inclined to think that will be the only day.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:45 pm FFFFUU-- If only I could hitch a ride with my sibling. And had $ to get in. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Zeon » Thu Jul 16, 2009 3:01 am I am.
